title: CrossModelReviewResult
description: Extended canonical review output schema for cross-model synthesis. Extends ReviewResult with three arrays of canonical finding items partitioned by model agreement. Produced by normalizeCrossModelResult in review-normalize.js. Convention: _source = design doc origin, _roadmap = feature code.

consensus.description: Findings flagged by both Claude and Codex for the same issue. Each item is a canonical finding shape from ReviewResult.

claude_only.description: Findings flagged only by Claude (not corroborated by Codex).

codex_only.description: Findings flagged only by Codex. Normalized to canonical finding shape by normalizeCrossModelResult.

lens.description: Lens name (e.g. 'diff-quality', 'security') or 'general' for Codex single-pass.

file.description: File path relative to working directory, or null if not file-specific.

line.description: Line number within file, or null.

severity.description: must-fix: blocks ship. should-fix: next iteration. nit: logged only.

applied_gate.description: The confidence gate that was applied when this finding was emitted. Stamped by normalizer if missing.
